title: Energizing Croatian Cheese Flatbread
description: A yeasty, snappy flatbread with shredded Monterey Jack, blanched spinach, and a nostalgic Croatian flair, perfect for a quick energizing meal.
instructions: In a mixing bowl combine flour, yeast, sugar, and sea salt.
Add warm water and olive oil, stir until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 8 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let rise for 45 minutes until doubled in size.
While the dough rises, blanch the spinach in boiling water for 2 minutes, then drain and squeeze out excess moisture.
After the dough has risen, punch it down, roll it into a 12‑inch circle, and transfer to a parchment‑lined baking sheet.
Sprinkle shredded Monterey Jack and blanched spinach evenly over the dough, then season with garlic powder, oregano, black pepper, and a drizzle of olive oil.
Bake at 220°C for 15 minutes until golden, then let rest 5 minutes before slicing.
